3324310.name: Porção Tropical
3324310.description:
Run an ice cream shop during the day and at night, venture into a forest full of monsters, challenges and incredible fruits that your customers will love!

In Porção Tropical, you'll run your own ice cream stand, delivering orders with skill and agility will earn you more money. With it, you improve your shop and your skills!!

At night, after the shop closes, it's time to replenish your supply of tropical fruits for the next day's customers by venturing into a forest rich in rare fruits and filled with danger. But don't worry, there are also new upgrades and skills to make your character more capable and powerful, to survive the dangers of the night!
3324310.supported_languages:
葡萄牙语 - 巴西*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
